creator: marka@nominum.com
text:
"make install" failed as /usr/local/lib/wine/reg was not made prior
        to calling install.

install -c -o root -g wheel -m 555  /usr/ports/emulators/wine/work/wine-20001026
/programs/regapi/regFixer.pl  /usr/ports/emulators/wine/work/wine-20001026/progr
ams/regapi/regRestorer.pl  /usr/local/lib/wine/reg
usage: install [-CcDpsv] [-f flags] [-g group] [-m mode] [-o owner] file1 file2
       install [-CcDpsv] [-f flags] [-g group] [-m mode] [-o owner] file1 ...
             fileN directory
       install -d [-v] [-g group] [-m mode] [-o owner] directory ...
*** Error code 64
